message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
participant "Application" as Application
participant "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as AutoSDKEngine
participant "«avs»\nAlexa" as Alexa

note right of User: "Turn off AC"
User -> Alexa: 
AutoSDKEngine <- Alexa: PowerController.TurnOff directive
activate AutoSDKEngine
AutoSDKEngine -> Application: Receive SetPowerControllerValue message
Application -> Application: Turn off AC
Application -> AutoSDKEngine: Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply
AutoSDKEngine -> Alexa: Alexa.Response event
note right of AutoSDKEngine: SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive\n«Alexa speech response»
Alexa -> Application: 
deactivate AutoSDKEngine

User
Application
AutoSDKEngine
Alexa
@enduml
